title: begonia molinana
intro: Begonia molinana, a species of flowering plant in the family Begoniaceae, is a type of rhizomatous begonia native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Begonia molinana include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and alleviating symptoms of fever and cold. The herbal preparations of Begonia molinana include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
